name: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts. We provide automated tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and reporting vendor early payment discounts.
features: manual entry of vendor payment terms
report generation for early payment opportunities
